inputs.label: Weight in Kilograms
inputs.businessContext: The weight of a single item or total weight in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The weight of a single item or total weight in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir öğenin ağırlığı veya kilogram cinsinden toplam ağırlık.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Gewicht eines einzelnen Artikels oder Gesamtgewicht in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids d'un seul article ou le poids total en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso de un solo artículo o peso total en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Number of Items
inputs.businessContext: Number of items with the given weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of items with the given weight.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Artikel mit dem angegebenen Gewicht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'articles ayant le poids donné.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de artículos con el peso dado.

inputs.label: Packaging Weight
inputs.businessContext: Additional packaging weight per batch in kilograms.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional packaging weight per batch in kilograms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parti başına kilogram cinsinden ek ambalaj ağırlığı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliches Verpackungsgewicht pro Charge in Kilogramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids d'emballage supplémentaire par lot en kilogrammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso adicional del embalaje por lote en kilogramos.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: Standard conversion factor from kilograms to grams (1 kg = 1000 g). Typically 1000, but can be adjusted for specific density/materials.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard conversion factor from kilograms to grams (1 kg = 1000 g). Typically 1000, but can be adjusted for specific density/materials.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilogramdan grama standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 kg = 1000 g). Tipik olarak 1000, ancak belirli yoğunluk/malzemeler için ayarlanabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor von Kilogramm in Gramm (1 kg = 1000 g). Typischerweise 1000, kann aber für spezifische Dichten/Materialien angepasst werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion standard des kilogrammes en grammes (1 kg = 1000 g). Généralement 1000, mais peut être ajusté pour une densité/matériau spécifique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión estándar de kilogramos a gramos (1 kg = 1000 g). Típicamente 1000, pero puede ajustarse para densidad/materiales específicos.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
